title: Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions family as a Full Stack Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions:
Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions!
